elements.sent-2411-288: In brief, $findclumps$ performs a floating average of channels over different spectral windows.

elements.sent-2411-292: Under the assumption that the positive emission comprehends real astrophysical sources and noise, while the negative emission are due only to noise, we use the following equation \citep{walter2016 : \begin{equation}{\rm fidelity (SNR)} = 1 - \dfrac{N_{\rm neg} ({\rm SNR})}{N_{\rm pos} ({\rm SNR})}\end{equation} with $N_{\rm neg ({\rm SNR )$ and $N_{\rm pos ({\rm SNR )$ are the number of negative and positive detections at a certain SNR, respectively.}}}}}
